title: Implement elapsed time formatting utility
description: Create a pure utility function `formatElapsed(ms: number): string` in `packages/Claude/src/tasks/` that formats milliseconds into `Xs`, `Xm Ys`, or `Xh Ym` (no decimals). Write tests first in `packages/Claude/test/tasks/elapsed.test.ts`.
acceptance_criteria: formatElapsed(5000) returns '5s', formatElapsed(272000) returns '4m 32s', formatElapsed(3900000) returns '1h 5m'. All edge cases (0ms, exact minute boundaries, exact hour boundaries) covered. Tests pass with `bun test`.
